feedback.text: imo, google should not be allowed to have a complete monopoly and communist dictatorship control on sideloading apps. they have gottent too big and do as they please when its not for the users benefit. there are many apps on fdroid that google play store doesnt support or offer. I prefer foss small sized apps that have a great reputation and offer no security risk. this is another one of googles tactic to dominate and control the system to be a closed system and control every aspect and be opposite of what android is. an open source software to minimize competion and force everyone on google play store. dont let google turn into apple. please dont allow google to have more and more power . be the peoples champion and put google in their place. they are reaching far beyond reasonable. I seriously hope DOJ/DSA?DMA control google as they are far out of control.
